p008.png.raw_text_summary: BASI exercise analysis methodology introduction with description and movement

p002.png.title: Table of Contents
p002.png.raw_text_summary: Table of Contents with 9 section entries

p009.png.title: Muscle Focus
p009.png.raw_text_summary: Explains Muscle Focus concept and its importance

p010.png.title: Objectives
p010.png.raw_text_summary: Explanation of Objectives concept in Pilates exercises

p011.png.title: CUES
p011.png.raw_text_summary: Explanation of cues role in Pilates teaching

p012.png.raw_text_summary: Joseph Pilates quote about mastering each exercise

p013.png.title: EXERCISES
p013.png.raw_text_summary: BASI exercises intro page with teaser note

p015.png.raw_text_summary: Handwritten notes on Pelvical and Footwork on Cadillac

p014.png.title: Pelvic Curl

exercises.name: Pelvic Curl
exercises.notes: Foundation level; spinal articulation with hip extensor control and pelvic lumbar stabilization.

p014.png.raw_text_summary: Pelvic Curl exercise detail, fundamental level, mat

p017.png.title: Chest Lift

exercises.name: Chest Lift
exercises.notes: Foundation block, Fundamental level; spinal flexor strength and pelvic lumbar stabilization focus.

p017.png.raw_text_summary: Chest Lift exercise detail, Foundation block, Fundamental level

p016.png.title: Spine Twist Supine

exercises.name: Spine Twist Supine
exercises.notes: Foundation block, Fundamental level; lying supine with arms in T position, legs in tabletop; inhale lower legs to one side, exhale return to start; alternate sides.

p016.png.raw_text_summary: Spine Twist Supine exercise detail, Foundation Fundamental level

p018.png.title: Chest Lift with Rotation

exercises.name: Chest Lift with Rotation
exercises.notes: Foundation block, Fundamental level; rotate to each side while maintaining trunk flexion and pelvic stability.

p018.png.raw_text_summary: Chest Lift with Rotation, Foundation, Fundamental level

p021.png.title: Hundred Prep

exercises.name: Hundred Prep
exercises.notes: Lying supine, legs in tabletop position, arms overhead; exhale lift arms, head and chest bringing arms to sides; inhale lower body to start.

p021.png.raw_text_summary: Hundred Prep abdominal work fundamental level exercise detail

p019.png.title: Single Leg Lift

exercises.name: Single Leg Lift
exercises.notes: Exhale lift one leg plantarflex foot; Inhale lower leg touch Mat with toes; maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization and 90 degree knee angle

p019.png.raw_text_summary: Single Leg Lift mat exercise, Foundation block, Fundamental level

p020.png.title: Leg Changes

exercises.name: Leg Changes
exercises.notes: Starting in Single Leg Changes; inhale lift one leg foot plantar flexed, exhale switch legs; maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization and consistent knee angle 90 degrees.

p020.png.raw_text_summary: Leg Changes exercise detail, Foundation block, Fundamental level

p022.png.title: Roll Up

exercises.name: Roll Up
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine; inhale lift arms/head/chest, exhale roll up, inhale pause, exhale roll down; maintain C curve throughout.

p022.png.raw_text_summary: Roll Up abdominal work exercise detail with cues

p023.png.title: Leg Circles

exercises.name: Leg Circles
exercises.notes: Lying supine, one leg straight up to ceiling, foot dorsiflexed, other leg on mat; circle leg across center line, down and around, reverse after 5 reps; focus on pelvic lumbar stabilization and hip disassociation.

p023.png.raw_text_summary: Leg Circles exercise detail, Abdominal Work, Fundamental level

p024.png.title: Roll-Like-a-Ball

exercises.name: Roll-Like-a-Ball
exercises.notes: Sitting in balanced position, body in ball shape, legs bent, hands on shins, feet off Mat; Inhale roll back, Exhale roll forward; Fundamental level.

p024.png.raw_text_summary: Roll-Like-a-Ball exercise detail, Fundamental level, Spinal Articulation

p025.png.title: Spine Stretch

exercises.name: Spine Stretch
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, legs straight, feet dorsiflexed, shoulder width apart, arms reaching forward parallel to mat; focus on spinal articulation and hip extensor stretch.

p025.png.raw_text_summary: Spine Stretch exercise detail, Fundamental level, Spinal Articulation block

p026.png.title: Side Lifts

exercises.name: Side Lifts
exercises.notes: Lying on side in neutral spine; exhale lift legs, inhale lower without touching mat; change side after 10 repetitions.

p026.png.raw_text_summary: Side Lifts fundamental mat lateral flexion rotation exercise

p028.png.title: Rest Position

exercises.name: Rest Position
exercises.notes: Kneeling, pelvis on heels, breathe freely relaxing back, neck and shoulders; muscle focus: spinal extensors.

p028.png.raw_text_summary: Rest Position fundamental block foundation exercise detail

p029.png.title: Hundred

exercises.name: Hundred
exercises.notes: Starting in Hundred Prep position; pump arms up and down for 5 counts exhale and 5 counts inhale; maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization

p029.png.raw_text_summary: Hundred exercise detail, intermediate level, abdominal work

p027.png.title: Back Extension

exercises.name: Back Extension
exercises.notes: Lying prone, lift upper trunk on inhale, lower without touching mat on exhale; focus on spinal extensor strength and pelvic lumbar stabilization.

p027.png.raw_text_summary: Back Extension exercise detail, Fundamental level, mat

p030.png.title: Double Leg Stretch

exercises.name: Double Leg Stretch
exercises.notes: Set up in Chest Lift position; inhale reach arms overhead and straighten legs, exhale circle arms and bend legs back to start.

p030.png.raw_text_summary: Double Leg Stretch abdominal work intermediate level

p031.png.title: Single Leg Stretch

exercises.name: Single Leg Stretch
exercises.notes: Starting in Double Leg Stretch position; maintain trunk flexion at consistent height; use arms to support position.

p031.png.raw_text_summary: Single Leg Stretch abdominal work intermediate level detail

p032.png.title: Criss Cross

exercises.name: Criss Cross
exercises.notes: Starting in Double Leg Stretch position, hands behind head, fingers interlaced; rotate toward bent knee alternating sides.

p032.png.raw_text_summary: Criss Cross abdominal exercise intermediate level mat

p035.png.title: Corkscrew

exercises.name: Corkscrew
exercises.notes: Lying supine, move legs to one side then circle down and around to opposite side; alternate direction. Level: Intermediate.

p035.png.raw_text_summary: Corkscrew exercise detail, lateral flexion/rotation, intermediate

p034.png.title: Spine Twist

exercises.name: Spine Twist
exercises.notes: Sitting upright, legs straight together, feet dorsiflexed, arms in T position, palms up; rotate trunk with 2 pulses exhale, inhale to center.

p034.png.raw_text_summary: Spine Twist exercise detail, intermediate level, lateral flexion/rotation

p033.png.title: Saw

exercises.name: Saw
exercises.notes: Intermediate level; sitting upright, legs straight, feet dorsiflexed, arms in T position; rotate trunk, reach forward past outside of foot, alternate sides.

p033.png.raw_text_summary: Saw exercise detail, lateral flexion rotation, intermediate level

p036.png.title: Single Leg Kick

exercises.name: Single Leg Kick
exercises.notes: Lying prone, trunk lifted, arms bent, elbows under shoulders, fingers interlaced, legs straight and together, lifted off Mat; Exhale/Inhale: Bend leg (2 pulses), switch legs (2 pulses); Final Inhale: Straighten legs, return to start position

p036.png.raw_text_summary: Single Leg Kick Back Extension Intermediate mat exercise

p037.png.title: Cat Stretch

exercises.name: Cat Stretch
exercises.notes: Kneeling in quadruped position, neutral spine, wrists under shoulders, knees under hips; Exhale round spine, Inhale extend spine; focus flexion in lumbar spine, extension in thoracic spine.

p037.png.raw_text_summary: Cat Stretch intermediate level bridging full body integration

p040.png.title: Back Support

exercises.name: Back Support
exercises.notes: Lift pelvis on exhale, lower pelvis without touching Mat on inhale; intermediate level.

p040.png.raw_text_summary: Back Support exercise in Bridging block, intermediate level

p038.png.raw_text_summary: Handwritten Korean notes mentioning Boxer exercise

p039.png.title: Front Support

exercises.name: Front Support
exercises.notes: Plank position alternating knee tucks; focus on spinal flexor control, trunk stabilization, hip flexor control, and scapular stabilization.

p039.png.raw_text_summary: Front Support plank knee tuck intermediate bridging block

p041.png.title: Seal Puppy

exercises.name: Seal Puppy
exercises.notes: Roll back clapping feet three times, roll up returning to start clapping feet three times; trunk stabilization and hip joint flexibility focus.

p041.png.raw_text_summary: Seal Puppy spinal articulation intermediate level exercise

p042.png.title: Hamstring Pull 1

exercises.name: Hamstring Pull 1
exercises.notes: Starting in Chest Lift position, legs perpendicular to Mat, hands behind calves; exhale lower one leg, inhale switch legs with 2 pulses.

p042.png.raw_text_summary: Hamstring Pull 1 mat exercise intermediate abdominal work

p043.png.title: Roll Over

exercises.name: Roll Over
exercises.notes: Lying supine, legs at 60 degrees diagonal, spinal flexion roll over with hip extensor stretch; Intermediate level.

p043.png.raw_text_summary: Roll Over exercise detail, Spinal Articulation, Intermediate level

p044.png.title: Open Leg Rocker

exercises.name: Open Leg Rocker
exercises.notes: Sitting in balanced position, back flat, one hand holding each leg (close to ankles), legs shoulder width apart, arms straight, feet plantarflexed; Inhale to round and roll back, Exhale to roll up, straighten back, return to start.

p044.png.raw_text_summary: Open Leg Rocker exercise detail, intermediate level, spinal articulation

p045.png.title: Shoulder Bridge Prep

exercises.name: Shoulder Bridge Prep
exercises.notes: Intermediate level; starting in up phase of Pelvic Curl; objectives include pelvic lumbar stabilization, hip extensor strength, hip flexor control, and hip disassociation.

p045.png.raw_text_summary: Shoulder Bridge Prep exercise detail, Bridging block, Intermediate

p047.png.title: Double Leg Kick

exercises.name: Double Leg Kick
exercises.notes: Lying prone, legs straight and together, lifted off Mat, fingers interlaced behind back; exhale bend both legs (3 pulses), inhale extend back and straighten legs and arms.

p047.png.raw_text_summary: Double Leg Kick back extension intermediate mat exercise

p049.png.title: Rocking Prep

exercises.name: Rocking Prep
exercises.notes: Lying prone, knees bent, arms straight reaching back, hands holding feet; lift trunk and legs toward ceiling then lower.

p049.png.raw_text_summary: Rocking Prep back extension intermediate level mat exercise

p050.png.title: Leg Pull Front

exercises.name: Leg Pull Front
exercises.notes: Starting in Front Support Position, one leg lifted slightly off Mat, foot plantarflexed; Exhale lift leg, Inhale lower leg, change leg after 5 repetitions.

p050.png.raw_text_summary: Leg Pull Front intermediate exercise on mat, Bridging block

p048.png.title: Swimming

exercises.name: Swimming
exercises.notes: Lying prone, arms and legs lifted, alternating arm and leg pattern with cross-coordination; maintain scapular and trunk stabilization.

p048.png.raw_text_summary: Swimming exercise detail, Back Extension block, Intermediate level

p052.png.title: Teaser Prep

exercises.name: Teaser Prep
exercises.notes: Sitting balanced, back flat, arms forward, legs lifted, knees bent, shins parallel to Mat; exhale roll down, inhale roll up.

p052.png.raw_text_summary: Teaser Prep mat exercise intermediate level detail

p053.png.title: Hamstring Pull 2

exercises.name: Hamstring Pull 2
exercises.notes: Intermediate level; lower one leg to Mat with 2 pulses while lifting other leg toward chest, then switch legs.

p053.png.raw_text_summary: Hamstring Pull 2 abdominal work intermediate level exercise

p054.png.title: Hamstring Pull 3

exercises.name: Hamstring Pull 3
exercises.notes: Starting in Hamstring Pull 2 position; lower one leg to mat, lift other toward chest, rotate trunk toward lifted leg (2 pulses), then switch.

p054.png.raw_text_summary: Hamstring Pull 3 exercise detail, intermediate level, abdominal work

p055.png.title: Shoulder Bridge

exercises.name: Shoulder Bridge
exercises.notes: Starting in up phase of Pelvic Curl, one leg straight, foot plantarflexed, reaching toward ceiling; exhale lower leg, inhale lift leg and dorsiflex foot; change leg after 5 repetitions.

p055.png.raw_text_summary: Shoulder Bridge exercise detail, intermediate level, bridging block

p056.png.title: Control Balance

exercises.name: Control Balance
exercises.notes: Advanced level; lift one leg toward ceiling with 2 pulses, switch legs; hip and spinal extensor focus

p056.png.raw_text_summary: Control Balance advanced mat exercise spinal articulation

p057.png.title: Jackknife

exercises.name: Jackknife
exercises.notes: Advanced level; starting in Roll Over position; spinal articulation with hip and shoulder extensor control.

p057.png.raw_text_summary: Jackknife exercise detail, Advanced, Spinal Articulation block

p051.png.title: Leg Pull Back

exercises.name: Leg Pull Back
exercises.notes: Starting in Back Support position; exhale to lift leg, inhale to lower; change leg after 5 repetitions; Intermediate level.

p051.png.raw_text_summary: Leg Pull Back exercise detail, Intermediate level, mat

p058.png.title: Hip Circles Prep

exercises.name: Hip Circles Prep
exercises.notes: Sitting in V position, arms straight behind pelvis; circle legs down and around to opposite side, change direction after 5 repetitions.

p058.png.raw_text_summary: Hip Circles Prep mat exercise, Advanced level, Lateral Flexion/Rotation

p059.png.title: Side Kick Kneeling

exercises.name: Side Kick Kneeling
exercises.notes: Kneeling on one knee, swing top leg forward with dorsiflex (2 pulses) and back with plantarflex (2 pulses); Advanced level.

p059.png.raw_text_summary: Side Kick Kneeling advanced lateral flexion rotation exercise detail

p060.png.title: Side Bend

exercises.name: Side Bend
exercises.notes: Advanced level; spinal lateral flexion with rotation, scapular stabilization, shoulder strength focus.

p060.png.raw_text_summary: Side Bend lateral flexion rotation advanced mat exercise

p063.png.title: Neck Pull

exercises.name: Neck Pull
exercises.notes: Lying supine, hands interlaced behind head, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed; Advanced level.

p063.png.raw_text_summary: Neck Pull abdominal work advanced mat exercise detail

p062.png.title: Teaser 1

exercises.name: Teaser 1
exercises.notes: Balance in V position, roll down and up with arms overhead; spinal flexor, extensor, and hip flexor focus.

p062.png.raw_text_summary: Teaser 1 exercise detail, Advanced level, Full Body Integration

p064.png.title: Scissors

exercises.name: Scissors
exercises.notes: Advanced level; open legs to Scissors position with 2 pulses on exhale, switch on inhale; muscle focus: hip flexors, hip extensors, spinal flexors

p064.png.raw_text_summary: Scissors exercise, advanced level, bridging/full body integration

p046.png.title: Side Kick

exercises.name: Side Kick
exercises.notes: Swing top leg forward with dorsiflex (2 pulses), swing back with plantarflex (2 pulses); change leg after 5 repetitions.

p046.png.raw_text_summary: Side Kick lateral flexion rotation intermediate level detail

p066.png.title: Corkscrew Advanced

exercises.name: Corkscrew Advanced
exercises.notes: Starting in Roll Over position, legs overhead; rotate and circle legs alternating sides; keep shoulders stable and maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization.

p066.png.raw_text_summary: Corkscrew Advanced lateral flexion rotation advanced level

p065.png.title: Bicycle

exercises.name: Bicycle
exercises.reps: 5 cycles on each leg, reverse direction
exercises.notes: Starting in Scissors position; maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization throughout; touch floor with foot of bent leg in both directions.

p065.png.raw_text_summary: Bicycle exercise, Advanced level, Bridging/Full Body Integration block

p067.png.title: Rocking

exercises.name: Rocking
exercises.notes: Starting in lifted position of Rocking Prep (page 48); initiate rock forward with hip extensor activation; keep head aligned with spine.

p067.png.raw_text_summary: Rocking exercise, Back Extension block, Advanced level

p061.png.title: Swan Dive Prep

exercises.name: Swan Dive Prep
exercises.notes: Advanced level; lying prone with elbows close to sides, forearms pressing into mat; lift trunk straightening arms on inhale, lower trunk bending arms and lifting legs on exhale.

p061.png.raw_text_summary: Swan Dive Prep back extension advanced mat exercise

p068.png.title: Rocking

exercises.name: Rocking
exercises.notes: Advanced level back extension; rock forward lifting feet, rock back lifting head, maintaining consistent body shape throughout.

p068.png.raw_text_summary: Rocking exercise, Back Extension block, Advanced level

p069.png.title: Teaser 2

exercises.name: Teaser 2
exercises.notes: Starting in Teaser 1 position; inhale lower legs, exhale lift legs; maintain stable trunk throughout; keep movement of legs controlled.

p069.png.raw_text_summary: Teaser 2 advanced exercise on cadillac bridging block

p070.png.title: Teaser 3

exercises.name: Teaser 3
exercises.notes: Starting in Teaser 1 position; lower trunk and legs simultaneously reaching arms overhead, then lift arms, trunk and legs to return.

p070.png.raw_text_summary: Teaser 3 advanced mat exercise bridging full body integration

p071.png.title: Hip Circles

exercises.name: Hip Circles
exercises.notes: Advanced level; maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization; move legs and pelvis as one unit; move arms, trunk and head as one unit.

p071.png.raw_text_summary: Hip Circles advanced exercise with lateral flexion rotation

p072.png.title: Twist

exercises.name: Twist
exercises.notes: Starting in Side Bend position; spinal rotator control and scapular stabilization focus.

p072.png.raw_text_summary: Twist exercise lateral flexion rotation advanced level

p075.png.title: Swan Dive

exercises.name: Swan Dive
exercises.notes: Advanced level; maintain consistent arc shape, engage abdominals throughout, maximize fluidity of movement.

p075.png.raw_text_summary: Swan Dive mat exercise, Back Extension, Advanced level

p073.png.title: Push Up

exercises.name: Push Up
exercises.notes: Advanced level; start in Front Support position; elbow extensors, scapular stabilizers, spinal flexors focus.

p073.png.raw_text_summary: Push Up exercise detail, Advanced level, Bridging block

p074.png.title: Swan Dive Prep with Catch

exercises.name: Swan Dive Prep with Catch
exercises.notes: Advanced level; starting in lifted position of Swan Dive Prep; maintain consistent arc shape and engage abdominals throughout.

p074.png.raw_text_summary: Swan Dive Prep with Catch advanced back extension mat exercise

p077.png.title: Crab

exercises.name: Crab
exercises.notes: Advanced level; sitting in balanced position, trunk in C curve, legs bent ankles crossed, roll back and over legs placing head on mat.

p077.png.raw_text_summary: Crab exercise detail, spinal articulation, advanced level

p076.png.title: Boomerang

exercises.name: Boomerang
exercises.notes: Advanced level; sitting with legs straight and crossed, roll down, roll over, switch legs, roll up to Teaser, circle arms behind back, return to start.

p076.png.raw_text_summary: Boomerang exercise detail, Advanced level, Spinal Articulation

p079.png.title: Forward and Lift

exercises.name: Forward and Lift
exercises.notes: Move leg forward to 90 degree hip flexion, lift leg, lower leg, then move leg back to start; keep pelvis stable throughout.

p079.png.raw_text_summary: Forward and Lift exercise from Gluteals Side Lying Series

p080.png.title: Forward with Drops

exercises.name: Forward with Drops
exercises.notes: Starting in Side Leg Lifts position, bringing leg forward to 90 degrees hip flexion; resistance light to medium

p080.png.raw_text_summary: Gluteals Side Lying Series Forward with Drops, Fundamental level

p078.png.title: Side Leg Lifts

exercises.name: Side Leg Lifts
exercises.notes: Resistance: light to medium; hip abductor strength and pelvic lumbar stabilization focus.

p078.png.raw_text_summary: Side Leg Lifts in Gluteals Side Lying Series, Fundamental level

p082.png.title: Hip Abduction Bent Knee

exercises.name: Hip Abduction Bent Knee
exercises.notes: Lift leg to side while maintaining pelvic stabilization and 90 degree knee angle.

p082.png.raw_text_summary: Hip Abduction Bent Knee, Gluteals Kneeling Series, Fundamental level

p081.png.title: Adductor Lift

exercises.name: Adductor Lift
exercises.notes: Resistance: light to medium; hip adductor strength and pelvic lumbar stabilization focus

p081.png.raw_text_summary: Adductor Lift exercise detail, Fundamental level, Leg Work

p083.png.title: Hip Extension Bent Knee

exercises.name: Hip Extension Bent Knee
exercises.notes: Kneeling in quadruped position, neutral spine, wrists under shoulders, knees under hips; focus on hip disassociation and pelvic stabilization.

p083.png.raw_text_summary: Hip Extension Bent Knee, Gluteals Kneeling Series, Fundamental level

p085.png.title: Chest Lift with Magic Circle

exercises.name: Chest Lift with Magic Circle
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, holding Magic Circle between knees and between hands; exhale to lift head and chest pressing circles, inhale pause, exhale lower and return.

p085.png.raw_text_summary: Chest Lift with Magic Circle, Foundation, Fundamental level

p087.png.title: Arms Straight

exercises.name: Arms Straight
exercises.notes: Starting in Arms Bent position with arms straight; exhale press arms together, inhale open arms.

p087.png.raw_text_summary: Arms Straight exercise, Arm Work block, Fundamental level

p086.png.title: Arms Bent

exercises.name: Arms Bent
exercises.notes: Standing or sitting with Magic Circle at chest height, arms bent; exhale press arms together, inhale open arms. Kneeling variation possible.

p086.png.raw_text_summary: Arms Bent with Magic Circle, Arm Work, Fundamental level

p088.png.title: Arms Overhead

exercises.name: Arms Overhead
exercises.notes: Starting in Arms Bent position, arms straight and overhead; exhale press arms together, inhale open arms.

p088.png.raw_text_summary: Arms Overhead exercise, Arm Work block, Fundamental level

p090.png.title: Single Arm Bicep

exercises.name: Single Arm Bicep
exercises.notes: Starting in Single Arm Side Press position, holding Magic Circle in one hand resting on shoulder; exhale press arm down, inhale lift arm.

p090.png.raw_text_summary: Single Arm Bicep with Magic Circle, Arms Series

p089.png.title: Single Arm Side Press

exercises.name: Single Arm Side Press
exercises.notes: Standing or kneeling, hand holding Magic Circle in one hand, resting it against side of body; exhale press arm, inhale open arm; maintain slight internal rotation of shoulder.

p089.png.raw_text_summary: Single Arm Side Press with Magic Circle, Arm Work

p084.png.title: Hip Extension Straight Leg

exercises.name: Hip Extension Straight Leg
exercises.notes: Starting in Hip Extension Bent Knee position, one leg straight back, foot plantarflexed; focus on hip disassociation and pelvic stabilization.

p084.png.raw_text_summary: Hip Extension Straight Leg, Gluteals Kneeling Series, Fundamental level

p091.png.title: Ankles

exercises.name: Ankles
exercises.notes: Magic Circle above ankles; press legs together on exhale, open on inhale; keep shins parallel

p091.png.raw_text_summary: Ankles exercise with Magic Circle, Sitting Series, Fundamental

p093.png.title: Above Knees

exercises.name: Above Knees
exercises.notes: Magic Circle above knees, perpendicular to floor; press legs together on exhale, open on inhale.

p093.png.raw_text_summary: Above Knees Sitting Series Leg Work Fundamental level

p092.png.title: Below Knees

exercises.name: Below Knees
exercises.notes: Magic Circle below knees, parallel to floor; press legs together on exhale, open on inhale; hip adductor strength and trunk stabilization.

p092.png.raw_text_summary: Below Knees Sitting Series Leg Work Fundamental level exercise

p094.png.title: Adductor Squeeze

exercises.name: Adductor Squeeze
exercises.notes: Lying supine in neutral spine, feet together, knees bent and apart, Magic Circle between knees; exhale press legs together, inhale open legs.

p094.png.raw_text_summary: Adductor Squeeze supine with Magic Circle, fundamental level

p096.png.title: Ankles

exercises.name: Ankles
exercises.notes: Magic Circle above ankles; press legs together on exhale, open on inhale; fundamental level.

p096.png.raw_text_summary: Supine Series Ankles exercise with Magic Circle, fundamental level

p098.png.title: Ankles Straight Knees Prone Series

exercises.name: Ankles Straight Knees Prone Series
exercises.notes: Starting in Ankles Bent Knees, legs straight, thighs lifted off Mat, Magic Circle above ankles; Exhale press legs together, Inhale open legs.

p098.png.raw_text_summary: Ankles Straight Knees Prone Series, Leg Work, Fundamental

p099.png.title: Hamstrings Prone Series

exercises.name: Hamstrings Prone Series
exercises.notes: Starting in Ankles Bent Knees Position, one leg straight, other leg bent and thigh off Mat, Magic Circle below gluteals and under heel; exhale bend leg, inhale straighten leg.

p099.png.raw_text_summary: Hamstrings Prone Series with Magic Circle, Fundamental level

p095.png.title: Knees

exercises.name: Knees
exercises.notes: Lying supine, legs in table top position, placing Magic Circle above knees, parallel to Mat; press legs together on exhale, open on inhale.

p095.png.raw_text_summary: Knees supine series with Magic Circle, fundamental level

p097.png.title: Ankles Bent Knees

exercises.name: Ankles Bent Knees
exercises.notes: Lying prone, knees bent at 90 degrees, thighs lifted off mat, feet plantarflexed, Magic Circle above ankles, head resting on back of hands; press legs together on exhale, open legs on inhale.

p097.png.raw_text_summary: Prone Series Ankles Bent Knees, Fundamental level, Leg Work block

p100.png.title: Swan 1

exercises.name: Swan 1
exercises.notes: Lying prone, arms straight overhead, Magic Circle between hands, parallel to Mat; lift trunk on inhale, lower on exhale.

p100.png.raw_text_summary: Swan 1 back extension exercise with Magic Circle, intermediate level

p101.png.title: Swan 2

exercises.name: Swan 2
exercises.notes: Magic Circle between hands, perpendicular to Mat; maintain tension in circle throughout movement.

p101.png.raw_text_summary: Swan 2 back extension with Magic Circle, fundamental level

p104.png.raw_text_summary: BASI Pilates logo and contact information page
